title: Damage
tmdbOverview: The life of a respected British politician at the height of his career crumbles when he becomes obsessed with his son's lover.
synopsis: Damage (1992) is a drama and romance film from United Kingdom and United States. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. A standout of 1990s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
